cardiometabolicScreeningDescription: Screening for diabetes, hypertension, and cardiovascular risk for early identification.
hivScreeningDescription: Review screening, initial testing, and HTS results recorded in the patient chart.
mentalHealthScreeningDescription: Brief mental health and psychosocial screening for referral or follow-up.
screeningWorklistDescription: Search for a patient to review screenings recorded in their chart. New domains will be enabled after their forms and clinical data are validated.
tbScreeningDescription: Initial assessment of signs, symptoms, and criteria for ruling out or referring tuberculosis.
